summary: Cemetery app with a top navigation bar containing four sections: Mapa grobów, Wyszukiwanie, Modlitwa za zmarłych, Nasz cmentarz.

existing_features.title: Replace or augment the existing navigation tiles in PublicPage.tsx with a sticky top navigation bar that contains four clearly labeled sections: 'Grave Map' (Mapa grobów), 'Search' (Wyszukiwanie), 'Prayer for the Deceased' (Modlitwa za zmarłych), and 'Our Cemetery' (Nasz cmentarz). The bar must be placed at the top of the public page, below the existing Header component, and allow smooth, instant switching between the four sections by scrolling to or revealing the corresponding content area.

Remove or hide the existing PublicSectionsTiles grid component (the four large tile cards) from PublicPage.tsx since its navigation role is now fulfilled by the new top navigation bar. The four content sections themselves (map, search, prayer, cemetery info) must remain fully functional and visible when their respective nav item is selected.

new_feature_requests.summary: Top navigation bar with four sections: Mapa grobów, Wyszukiwanie, Modlitwa za zmarłych, Nasz cmentarz — styled aesthetically for smooth navigation
